Meet Our Instructors

Experienced, compassionate teachers dedicated to guiding you on your wellness journey

Maya Anindita

Lead Yoga Instructor

500-hour certified yoga instructor specializing in Vinyasa and for the Yoga Method for Creating Space for authentic self-expression through mindful movement.

Browse Schedule Contact

Sarah Kusuma

Mat Pilates Specialist

Certified Pilates instructor with a compassionate nature. Sarah's classes focus on building strength with refinement and self-awareness through intentional movement.

Browse Schedule Contact

Devi Lakshmi

Meditation & Sound Healing

Experienced meditation teacher and sound healer. Devi guides students through breathwork, body scan meditation, and healing sound practices with warmth and clarity.

Browse Schedule Contact

Rina Permata

Dance Fitness Instructor

Professional dancer and choreographer who brings energy, joy, and liberation to every class. Rina makes fitness into a dance — fluid, expressive, and deeply alive.

Browse Schedule Contact

Interested in Teaching With Us?

We are always looking for passionate, experienced instructors who share our values of intentionality, community, and authentic growth.
